languages.text:
The familiar immediately restores 100% Wounds. The familiar is also resurrected if it has 0 Wounds. The next 3 Overseer abilities cost -1 AP.
Until the end of combat, the Overseer's allies benefit from the Scried status applied to the enemies.
The familiar's maximum Wounds are reduced by 50%. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivate{/g} now also spends all available MP.

languages.text:
The servo-skull swarm immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the Overseer's allies also ignore the {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} of enemies that are {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}under surveillance{/g}.
The servo-skull swarm's {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g} are reduced by −50%. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivate{/g} now spends all the Overseer's {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.

languages.text:
Рой сервочерепов немедленно полностью восстанавливает {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровье{/g} (даже при 0 здоровья). Три следующие {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способности{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}надзирателя{/g} требуют на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}ОД{/g} меньше.
До конца боя союзники надзирателя также игнорируют {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}укрытие{/g} противников {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}под наблюдением{/g}.
{g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}Максимальное здоровье{/g} роя сервочерепов сокращается на 50%. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Перезапуск{/g} расходует все {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}ОП{/g} надзирателя.

traits.locale_text:
Рой сервочерепов немедленно полностью восстанавливает здоровье (даже при 0 здоровья). Три следующие способности надзирателя требуют на 1 ОД меньше.
До конца боя союзники надзирателя также игнорируют укрытие противников {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}под наблюдением{/g}.
Максимальное здоровье роя сервочерепов сокращается на 50%. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Перезапуск{/g} расходует все ОП надзирателя.

Рой сервочерепов немедленно полностью восстанавливает здоровье (даже при 0 здоровья). Три следующие способности надзирателя требуют на 1 ОД меньше.
До конца боя союзники надзирателя также игнорируют укрытие противников {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}под наблюдением{/g}.
Максимальное здоровье роя сервочерепов сокращается на 50%. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Перезапуск{/g} расходует все ОП надзирателя.

languages.text:
Der Servoschädel-Schwarm regeneriert seine {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunden{/g} vollständig (selbst wenn er 0 Wunden hat). Die nächsten drei {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}Fähigkeiten{/g} des {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Aufsehers{/g} kosten -1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} weniger.
Bis zum Ende des Kampfes ignorieren Verbündete des Aufsehers die {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}Deckung{/g} von Gegnern, die {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}unter Beobachtung{/g} stehen.
Die {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximalen Wunden{/g} des Servoschädel-Schwarms werden um -50 % reduziert. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reaktivieren{/g} verbraucht jetzt alle {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}BP{/g} des Aufsehers.
languages.original_text:
The servo-skull swarm immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the Overseer's allies also ignore the {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} of enemies that are {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}under surveillance{/g}.
The servo-skull swarm's {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g} are reduced by −50%. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivate{/g} now spends all the Overseer's {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Der Servoschädel-Schwarm regeneriert seine Wunden vollständig (selbst wenn er 0 Wunden hat). Die nächsten drei Fähigkeiten des Aufsehers kosten -1 AP weniger.
Bis zum Ende des Kampfes ignorieren Verbündete des Aufsehers die Deckung von Gegnern, die {g|f:a115669547864ccc816f0598a404e816}unter Beobachtung{/g} stehen.
Die maximalen Wunden des Servoschädel-Schwarms werden um -50 % reduziert. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reaktivieren{/g} verbraucht jetzt alle BP des Aufsehers.

languages.text:
L'essaim de servocrânes régénère immédiatement toute sa réserve de {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g} (même s'il n'en a aucune). Le coût des trois prochaines {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacités{/g} du {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}surveillant{/g} est réduit de −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g}.
Jusqu'à la fin du combat, les alliés du surveillant ignorent la {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}couverture{/g} des ennemis {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}sous surveillance{/g}.
Les {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}blessures maximums{/g} de l'essaim de servocrânes sont réduites de −50 %. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Réactivation{/g} consomme désormais tous les {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PD{/g} du surveillant.
languages.original_text:
The servo-skull swarm immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the Overseer's allies also ignore the {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} of enemies that are {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}under surveillance{/g}.
The servo-skull swarm's {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g} are reduced by −50%. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivate{/g} now spends all the Overseer's {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
L'essaim de servocrânes régénère immédiatement toute sa réserve de blessures (même s'il n'en a aucune). Le coût des trois prochaines capacités du surveillant est réduit de −1 PA.
Jusqu'à la fin du combat, les alliés du surveillant ignorent la couverture des ennemis {g|f:a115669547864ccc816f0598a404e816}sous surveillance{/g}.
Les blessures maximums de l'essaim de servocrânes sont réduites de −50 %. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Réactivation{/g} consomme désormais tous les PD du surveillant.

languages.text:
完全恢复伺服头骨集群的{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}（即便生命值为0也可以完全恢复）。{g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}监察官{/g}接下来的3个{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}，消耗的{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}行动点数{/g}降低1点。
监察官的盟友攻击处于{g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}一览无余{/g}状态的敌人时，也同样会无视目标的{g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}掩体{/g}效果。
伺服头骨集群的{g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}最大生命值{/g}降低50%，{g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}重新激活{/g}能力会消耗监察官所有{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}移动点数{/g}。
languages.original_text:
The servo-skull swarm immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the Overseer's allies also ignore the {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} of enemies that are {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}under surveillance{/g}.
The servo-skull swarm's {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g} are reduced by −50%. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivate{/g} now spends all the Overseer's {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
完全恢复伺服头骨集群的生命值（即便生命值为0也可以完全恢复）。监察官接下来的3个能力，消耗的行动点数降低1点。
监察官的盟友攻击处于{g|f:a115669547864ccc816f0598a404e816}一览无余{/g}状态的敌人时，也同样会无视目标的掩体效果。
伺服头骨集群的最大生命值降低50%，{g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}重新激活{/g}能力会消耗监察官所有移动点数。

languages.text:
El enjambre de servocráneos recupera inmediatamente todas las {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}heridas{/g} (aunque esté a 0 heridas). Las siguientes 3 {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacidades{/g} del {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}supervisor{/g} cuestan −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g}.
Hasta el final del combate, los aliados del supervisor también ignoran la {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cobertura{/g} de enemigos {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}bajo vigilancia{/g}.
Las {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}heridas máximas{/g} del enjambre de servocráneos se reducen un −50 %. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivación{/g} ahora consume todos los {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}PM{/g} del supervisor.
languages.original_text:
The servo-skull swarm immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the Overseer's allies also ignore the {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} of enemies that are {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}under surveillance{/g}.
The servo-skull swarm's {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g} are reduced by −50%. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivate{/g} now spends all the Overseer's {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
El enjambre de servocráneos recupera inmediatamente todas las heridas (aunque esté a 0 heridas). Las siguientes 3 capacidades del supervisor cuestan −1 PA.
Hasta el final del combate, los aliados del supervisor también ignoran la cobertura de enemigos {g|f:a115669547864ccc816f0598a404e816}bajo vigilancia{/g}.
Las heridas máximas del enjambre de servocráneos se reducen un −50 %. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivación{/g} ahora consume todos los PM del supervisor.

languages.text:
サーヴォスカル・スウォームは即座に全快まで回復する（{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}傷{/g}が0の場合も）。{g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}監督官{/g}の次の3つの{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}アビリティ{/g}コストが-1{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}される。
戦闘終了まで、監督官の味方も{g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}監督下{/g}の敵の {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}遮蔽物{/g}を無視できる。
サーヴォスカル・スウォームの{g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}最大の傷{/g}が-50%低下する。{g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}再起動{/g}は監督官のすべての{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}を消費する。

Until the end of combat, the Overseer's allies also ignore the {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} of enemies that are {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}under surveillance{/g}.
The servo-skull swarm's {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g} are reduced by −50%. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivate{/g} now spends all the Overseer's {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
サーヴォスカル・スウォームは即座に全快まで回復する（傷が0の場合も）。監督官の次の3つのアビリティコストが-1APされる。
戦闘終了まで、監督官の味方も{g|f:a115669547864ccc816f0598a404e816}監督下{/g}の敵の遮蔽物を無視できる。
サーヴォスカル・スウォームの最大の傷が-50%低下する。{g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}再起動{/g}は監督官のすべてのMPを消費する。

languages.text:
Hizmelet sürüsü, anında iyileşerek tam sağlığına kavuşur (s{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}ağlık puanı{/g} 0 olsa bile). {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Gözetmen'in{/g} sonraki üç {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}kabiliyeti{/g} 1 puan daha az {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}EP{/g} harcar.
Çatışma sonuna dek Gözetmen'in dost birimleri de {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}gözetim altındaki{/g} düşmanların {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}siperlerini{/g} yok sayar.
Hizmelet sürüsünün {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maksimum sağlık puanı{/g} %50 azalır. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Yeniden Başlat{/g} artık Gözetmen'in tüm {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}HP'sini{/g} harcar.

The servo-skull swarm immediately heals to full {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} (even if it has 0 wounds). The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next three {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g} cost −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
Until the end of combat, the Overseer's allies also ignore the {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} of enemies that are {g|f:5fcfda67ccb14a66a0ff79d2b9ee250c}under surveillance{/g}.
The servo-skull swarm's {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g} are reduced by −50%. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivate{/g} now spends all the Overseer's {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Hizmelet sürüsü, anında iyileşerek tam sağlığına kavuşur (sağlık puanı 0 olsa bile). Gözetmen'in sonraki üç kabiliyeti 1 puan daha az EP harcar.
Çatışma sonuna dek Gözetmen'in dost birimleri de {g|f:a115669547864ccc816f0598a404e816}gözetim altındaki{/g} düşmanların siperlerini yok sayar.
Hizmelet sürüsünün maksimum sağlık puanı %50 azalır. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Yeniden Başlat{/g} artık Gözetmen'in tüm HP'sini harcar.

Hizmelet sürüsü, anında iyileşerek tam sağlığına kavuşur (s{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}ağlık puanı{/g} 0 olsa bile). {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Gözetmen{/g}'in sonraki üç {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}kabiliyeti{/g} 1 puan daha az EP harcar.
Çatışma sonuna dek Gözetmen'in dost birimleri de {g|f:a115669547864ccc816f0598a404e816}gözetim altındaki{/g} düşmanların siperlerini yok sayar.
Hizmelet sürüsünün maksimum sağlık puanı %50 azalır. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Yeniden Başlat{/g} artık Gözetmen'in tüm HP'sini harcar.
